overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a character in a long coat and hat walking up a grassy mountain trail. The character ascends through a rocky valley that gradually opens to reveal panoramic mountain vistas, encountering a horseback rider along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy valley trail between rocky slopes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill along a narrow dirt trail through tall grass and shrubs between rocky hillsides

entered.detail: large gray rock formation covered with patches of grass forming the left wall of the trail
steep hillside covered in tall green grass and low shrubs
narrow winding path of packed dirt and scattered stones
tall evergreen trees dotting the hillside ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily uphill through a narrow valley trail enclosed by a rocky cliff on the left and grassy slopes on the right. The path winds through dense vegetation with pine trees visible ahead against a bright blue sky.

events.description: rider on horseback approaches from behind and passes by on the right, continuing up the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing uphill along the trail as a horseback rider overtakes and passes by

notable_agents.action: rider on a brown and white horse trotting past the character and riding ahead up the trail

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peaks becoming visible through the gap in the hills ahead

segments.scene_description: As the trail widens slightly, a rider on horseback overtakes the character from behind and rides ahead. The landscape begins to open up, revealing distant snow-capped mountains on the horizon while the character continues the ascent.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain ridge trail with panoramic vista

events.description: trail emerges from enclosed valley into open mountainside with expansive views

agents.ego_description: walking along the open ridge trail with sweeping views of the mountain range ahead and wildflowers along the path

entered.detail: clusters of red and orange wildflowers growing alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail opens completely to reveal a breathtaking panoramic view of the mountain range ahead. The character walks along the ridge with rocky cliffs on the left and vibrant wildflowers lining the right side of the path, continuing the steady ascent toward the distant peaks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends from a confined rocky valley into a vast, open mountain panorama. It begins with the character walking steadily uphill along a narrow trail enclosed by a steep cliff and grassy slopes, winding through dense vegetation toward a cluster of pine trees. As the path widens, a rider on horseback overtakes the character from behind and rides ahead, while the horizon begins to expand to reveal distant snow-capped peaks. The scene then opens completely onto a breathtaking ridge, where the enclosed valley gives way to a wide vista of the mountain range. Finally, the camera follows the character along this high path, flanked by rocky cliffs on the left and vibrant wildflowers on the right, as they continue their ascent toward the distant summits.
